rationale: The cited paper’s core finding is a pre-use vs. post-use evaluation gap (“feature fatigue,” with construal-style weighting shifts), which aligns closely with the citing paper’s core focus on intention formation versus follow-through and expected-versus-actual early use calibration. Given this strong conceptual overlap in constructs and mechanism framing (both in consumer new technology contexts), the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention.
